title: Sigma Tile Cutter Art. 4BU 70 cm
description: Aluminium frame with push engraving and split adjustment. Thickness: Cutting 0-17mm Rotation Foot Break Metric Bar Adjustable 70 x 70 cm
features: Ergonomically shaped handle, specific for traction engraving
The engraving wheel diameter 12 mm is always visible on the operator side
CNC milled wheel holder excavation and anti-friction metal shell to eliminate friction and lateral wear of the engraving wheel
The roller carriage is wear-free thanks to 3 double-row ball bearings that ensure precision, maintenance-free
